title: Release Slick Sim v1 Release · slicktokenllc/SlickSim_v1
excerpt: SlickToken is a behavioral simulator for LLM inference infrastructure. It answers capacity planning questions before you spend money on hardware: which GPU fleet handles your traffic, when you'll n...
content_html:
SlickToken is a behavioral simulator for LLM inference infrastructure. It answers capacity planning questions before you spend money on hardware: which GPU fleet handles your traffic, when you'll need to scale, what happens if you switch engines, and what the real cost of a multi-step AI workflow is.

This is the first version of the software. Strictly simulation. No live data required. Free until July 2027.

No data leaves your machine. No internet connection required after license installation.

It answers capacity planning questions before you spend money on hardware: which GPU fleet handles your traffic, when you'll need to scale, what happens if you switch engines, and what the real cost of a multi-step AI workflow is. This is the first version of the software. Strictly simulation. No live data required. Free until July 2027. No data leaves your machine. No internet connection required after license installation.

sentences.en: It answers capacity planning questions before you spend money on hardware: which GPU fleet handles your traffic, when you'll need to scale, what happens if you switch engines, and what the real cost of a multi-step AI workflow is.
sentences.zh: 它可以在您花钱购买硬件之前回答容量规划问题：哪个 GPU 队列处理您的流量、何时需要扩展、切换引擎会发生什么以及多步骤 AI 工作流程的实际成本是多少。

content_html_zh:
SlickToken 是 LLM 推理基础设施的行为模拟器。 它可以在您花钱购买硬件之前回答容量规划问题：哪个 GPU 队列处理您的流量、何时需要扩展、切换引擎会发生什么以及多步骤 AI 工作流程的实际成本是多少。

这是该软件的第一个版本。 严格模拟。 无需实时数据。 2027 年 7 月之前免费。

没有数据离开您的机器。 安装许可证后无需互联网连接。
